name: Arithmetic Kingdom
description: The land of numbers — primes, factors, fractions, and everything that counts.

name: Geometry Kingdom
description: A realm of shapes, angles, and the hidden symmetry of space.
unlockRequirements: Complete the Arithmetic Kingdom Boss to unlock

name: Algebra Kingdom
description: Where letters hold secrets — variables, equations, and functions wait to be solved.
unlockRequirements: Complete the Geometry Kingdom Boss to unlock

name: Statistics Kingdom
description: The domain of data — patterns, probability, and the stories numbers tell.
unlockRequirements: Complete the Algebra Kingdom Boss to unlock

name: Trigonometry Kingdom
description: The final frontier — angles, ratios, and the mathematics of triangles.
unlockRequirements: Complete the Statistics Kingdom Boss to unlock
